questions.question: Sanitation worker ka primary role kya hai?

options.A: Public places ko saaf aur hygienic rakhna
options.B: Bijli ke poles theek karna

questions.explanation: Sanitation worker ka mukhya kaam public areas aur infrastructure ko saaf suthra aur swasthya-friendly rakhna hai.

questions.question: PPE ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Public Property Entry

questions.explanation: PPE ka matlab 'Personal Protection Equipment' hai, jo workers ko hazards se bachane ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Sanitation work karte samay kaun sa PPE sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Safety gloves

questions.explanation: Safety gloves chemicals, sharp objects aur germs se haathon ki suraksha ke liye bahut zaroori hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko kaam karte waqt koi sharp object mile, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Use jahan hai wahi chhod denge
options.C: Proper tools (jaise tongs) se utha kar surakshit tareeke se dispose karenge

questions.explanation: Sharp objects ko bina proper tools ke uthana chot ka karan ban sakta hai. Unhe surakshit tareeke se handle aur dispose karna chahiye.

questions.question: Confined space mein enter karne se pehle kya precaution lena chahiye?

options.A: Bas jaldi se enter kar lena chahiye
options.B: Proper ventilation aur gas detection check karna chahiye
options.C: Headphones pehen kar enter karna chahiye
options.D: Andar jaakar sab check kar lenge

questions.explanation: Confined spaces mein toxic gases ya oxygen ki kami ho sakti hai, isliye proper ventilation aur gas detection bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Sanitation workers ko kaun se health risks ho sakte hain?

options.B: Heart disease
options.C: Infections, respiratory problems aur skin irritations

questions.explanation: Waste aur sewage ke contact mein aane se workers ko infections, saans ki takleef aur skin problems ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Workplace par first aid box ki kya importance hai?

options.B: Emergency mein choti choton ka ilaaj karne ke liye

questions.explanation: First aid box choti choton aur accidents ke turant ilaaj ke liye zaroori hai, taaki gambhir hone se roka ja sake.

questions.question: Manual scavenging ko India mein kyun ban kiya gaya hai?

options.B: Yeh insaani garima ke khilaf hai aur health risks se bhara hai
options.D: Isme machines ka use nahi hota

questions.explanation: Manual scavenging insaani garima ka ullanghan karta hai aur workers ke liye jaanleva health hazards paida karta hai, isliye yeh ban hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko kisi coworker ko chot lagte hue dikhe, toh pehla step kya hoga?

options.B: Ignore kar denge
options.C: Turant first aid denge aur senior ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Emergency mein turant help karna aur authorities ko inform karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Sanitation work mein chemical exposure se bachne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Bina kisi precaution ke chemicals handle karna
options.B: Proper gloves, masks aur protective clothing pehenna

questions.explanation: Chemicals se skin, aankhon aur saans ki suraksha ke liye proper PPE ka use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Workplace par 'Danger' sign ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Yahan koi khatra nahi hai
options.C: Yahan gambhir chot ya maut ka khatra hai

questions.explanation: 'Danger' sign sabse high level ke hazard ko indicate karta hai jahan serious injury ya death ka risk ho.

questions.question: Safe lifting techniques mein kya shamil hai?

options.A: Apni peeth mod kar bhaari cheezein uthana
options.B: Apne ghutne mod kar, peeth seedhi rakh kar uthana
options.C: Bina kisi help ke bahut bhaari cheezein uthana

questions.explanation: Sahi lifting technique mein ghutne modna, peeth seedhi rakhna aur legs ki strength ka use karna shamil hai taaki back injury se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Sanitation workers ke liye regular medical check-ups kyun important hain?

options.B: Health risks ko pehchanne aur unka ilaaj karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular medical check-ups workers ko hone wale health issues ko early detect karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Kya sanitation workers ko traffic safety rules follow karne chahiye?

options.B: Haan, apni aur doosron ki suraksha ke liye

questions.explanation: Traffic safety rules follow karna sabke liye zaroori hai, especially jab road par kaam kar rahe hon.

questions.question: Hazardous waste ko handle karte samay kya extra precaution lena chahiye?

options.A: Use normal dustbin mein fenk denge
options.B: Special PPE aur designated containers use karna chahiye
options.C: Use hath se touch karke check karenge

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste ko handle karne ke liye vishesh training, PPE aur disposal methods ki zaroorat hoti hai taaki contamination aur injury se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Agar aapko lagta hai ki koi task unsafe hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apne supervisor ko inform karna chahiye
options.C: Apne aap theek karne ki koshish karni chahiye
options.D: Kaam chhod kar chale jana chahiye

questions.explanation: Unsafe conditions ko turant supervisor ko report karna zaroori hai taaki sahi action liya ja sake aur accidents se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Ergonomics ka sanitation work mein kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf office workers ke liye hai
options.B: Yeh kaam ko zyada comfortable aur efficient banane mein help karta hai, choton ko kam karta hai
options.C: Yeh tools ko sundar banata hai
options.D: Iska sanitation work se koi lena dena nahi

questions.explanation: Ergonomics ka use karne se workers ko physical strain aur musculoskeletal injuries se bachaya ja sakta hai, jisse unki productivity aur safety badhti hai.

questions.question: Waste collection ke liye commonly use hone wala tool kaun sa hai?

options.B: Shovel (belcha)

questions.explanation: Shovel ya belcha loose waste, mitti, aur kachra uthane ke liye ek basic aur zaroori tool hai.

questions.question: Galiyon aur footpath se kachra saaf karne ke liye kaun sa tool best hai?

options.B: Broom (jhaadu)

questions.explanation: Broom ya jhaadu chhote particles aur dust ko sweep karne ke liye sabse common aur effective tool hai.

questions.question: Drainage pipes se blockage hatane ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Plunger (toilet cleaner)

questions.explanation: Plunger ek suction device hai jo chhote blockages ko clear karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Bade aur gehre drains se kachra nikalne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Long-handled scoop ya Tongs (chimta)

questions.explanation: Long-handled scoop ya tongs workers ko bina drain mein ghuse kachra nikalne mein help karte hain, jisse safety badhti hai.

questions.question: Sewage lines mein hard blockages ko clear karne ke liye kaun si machine use hoti hai?

options.B: High-pressure jetting machine

questions.explanation: High-pressure jetting machine paani ki tez dhaar se bade aur tough blockages ko tod kar saaf karti hai.

questions.question: Solid waste ko collect karne ke liye kaun sa vehicle use hota hai?

options.B: Garbage truck (kachra gaadi)

questions.explanation: Garbage truck ya kachra gaadi large quantities mein solid waste collect aur transport karne ke liye designed hoti hai.

questions.question: Manholes ke covers uthane ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Manhole hook/key

questions.explanation: Manhole hook ya key specifically heavy manhole covers ko safely uthane ke liye banaya gaya hai.

questions.question: Drainage system ki inspection ke liye kaun sa modern equipment use ho sakta hai?

options.B: CCTV Drain Inspection Camera

questions.explanation: CCTV Drain Inspection Camera pipes ke andar ki condition ko visually inspect karne aur blockages ya damage ko locate karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Hazardous waste ko store karne ke liye kaise containers use karne chahiye?

options.B: Leak-proof, properly labeled aur sturdy containers

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste ko leak-proof, labeled aur sturdy containers mein store karna zaroori hai taaki spillage aur contamination se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Kya sanitation tools ko regular maintain karna zaroori hai?

options.A: Nahi, unhe aise hi use karna chahiye
options.B: Haan, unki efficiency aur lifespan badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance tools ko achhi working condition mein rakhta hai, unki life badhata hai aur accidents ke chances kam karta hai.

questions.question: Sewerage pumping station mein kaun sa equipment use hota hai?

options.B: Pumps

questions.explanation: Pumps sewerage ko low elevation se high elevation tak move karne ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Street sweeping ke liye modern equipment kya hai?

options.B: Mechanical street sweeper

questions.explanation: Mechanical street sweeper bade areas ko efficiently aur jaldi saaf karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Gutter cleaning ke liye kaun sa tool helpful hai?

options.B: Gutter scoop

questions.explanation: Gutter scoop specifically gutters se leaves aur debris nikalne ke liye designed hota hai.

questions.question: Drain rods ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Chhote aur medium blockages ko manual tarike se clear karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Drain rods flexible rods hote hain jinhe pipes mein push karke blockages ko todne ya move karne ke liye use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Kya safety harnesses confined space entry ke liye zaroori hain?

options.B: Haan, worker ko rescue karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Safety harnesses worker ko confined space se safely nikalne mein help karte hain agar koi emergency ho.

questions.question: Biohazard bags ka kya use hai?

options.A: General household waste rakhne ke liye
options.B: Infectious ya medical waste ko safely dispose karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Biohazard bags specially designed hote hain infectious ya medical waste ko contain karne ke liye taaki contamination na phaile.

questions.question: Sewer gas detector kis liye use hota hai?

options.A: Sewer mein paani ka level check karne ke liye
options.B: Toxic aur flammable gases ko detect karne ke liye
options.C: Sewer ki gehrai naapne ke liye
options.D: Sewer ka temperature check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sewer gas detector workers ko potentially dangerous gases, jaise hydrogen sulfide ya methane, ki presence ke baare mein alert karta hai.

questions.question: Waste segregation ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sab tarah ke kachre ko ek saath milana
options.B: Kachre ko alag-alag categories mein baantna
options.D: Kachre ko zameen mein gaad dena

questions.explanation: Waste segregation mein kachre ko uske type (jaise wet, dry, recyclable, hazardous) ke hisaab se alag karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Wet waste mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Khana bachaa hua, sabzi ke chhilke

questions.explanation: Wet waste mein organic matter hota hai jo decompose ho sakta hai, jaise food scraps aur garden waste.

questions.question: Dry waste mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Used tea leaves

questions.explanation: Dry waste non-biodegradable hota hai aur isme recyclables shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Recyclable waste ko alag karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Isse landfills mein jagah kam ho jaati hai aur naye products banaye ja sakte hain
options.B: Isse kachra zyada badhta hai

questions.explanation: Recycling se natural resources bachate hain, energy save hoti hai, aur pollution kam hota hai.

questions.question: Hazardous waste ke examples kya hain?

options.B: Newspapers

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste mein aise substances hote hain jo environment ya human health ke liye harmful ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Composting ke liye kaun sa waste best hai?

options.B: Electronic waste

questions.explanation: Composting ek natural process hai jisme organic waste ko nutrient-rich soil mein convert kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Door-to-door waste collection ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Isse log kachra road par phenkte hain
options.B: Isse public spaces saaf rehte hain aur illegal dumping kam hota hai

questions.explanation: Door-to-door collection convenient hota hai aur cities ko cleaner rakhne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Landfill kya hai?

options.B: Kachre ko scientific tareeke se dispose karne ki jagah

questions.explanation: Landfill ek engineered site hai jahan waste ko zameen mein dafnaaya jata hai, jisme environmental impact ko kam karne ke liye liners aur monitoring systems hote hain.

questions.question: Incineration kya hai?

options.B: Kachre ko high temperature par jalana

questions.explanation: Incineration waste ko high temperatures par jalakar uski volume kam karta hai aur energy generate kar sakta hai.

questions.question: E-waste (electronic waste) ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?

options.B: Special e-waste collection centers par

questions.explanation: E-waste mein harmful chemicals hote hain, isliye use special collection centers par dispose karna chahiye jahan use properly recycle ya process kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Waste management hierarchy mein sabse pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Reduce (kam karna)

questions.explanation: Waste management hierarchy 'Reduce, Reuse, Recycle' par based hai, jisme 'Reduce' sabse pehla aur sabse effective step hai.

questions.question: Public dustbins ko regularly empty karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf jagah khali karne ke liye
options.B: Badboo aur bimariyon ko phailne se rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Overfilled dustbins se badboo, pests aur bimariyan phail sakti hain, isliye timely emptying zaroori hai.

questions.question: Bio-medical waste ko handle karne ke liye kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.A: Bina gloves ke haath se uthana
options.B: Proper PPE, biohazard bags aur special disposal methods use karna

questions.explanation: Bio-medical waste mein infectious material ho sakta hai, isliye ise handle karte samay extreme care aur specific protocols follow karne chahiye.

questions.question: Construction and Demolition (C&D) waste ke examples kya hain?

options.B: Plastic bottles

questions.explanation: C&D waste building construction, renovation aur demolition activities se generate hota hai.

questions.question: Kachre ke improper disposal se kya environmental problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Zameen, paani aur hawa ka pradushan (pollution)

questions.explanation: Improper waste disposal se zameen, paani aur hawa mein harmful substances release hote hain jo environment ko nuksan pahunchate hain.

questions.question: Waste collection routes ko optimize karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Fuel save karne, efficiency badhane aur collection cost kam karne ke liye
options.C: Zyada kachra collect karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Efficient routes se collection time, fuel consumption aur operational costs kam hote hain, aur services better hoti hain.

questions.question: Source segregation ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kachre ko collection point par alag karna
options.B: Kachre ko uske paida hone ki jagah par hi alag karna
options.C: Kachre ko landfill mein alag karna
options.D: Kachre ko jalane se pehle alag karna

questions.explanation: Source segregation ka matlab hai kachre ko gharon ya businesses mein hi alag-alag bins mein dalna, jisse recycling aur disposal easy ho jata hai.

questions.question: Choked drain ko clear karne ka pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Blockage ka cause aur location pata karna

questions.explanation: Blockage ka cause aur location janne se sahi method aur tools choose karne mein help milti hai.

questions.question: Drain cleaning mein plunger ka kya use hai?

options.B: Suction create karke chhote blockages ko dislodge karna

questions.explanation: Plunger ek simple mechanical tool hai jo suction aur pressure se blockages ko move karta hai.

questions.question: Drain rods (saaf karne wali rod) kis tarah ke blockages ke liye effective hain?

options.B: Soft blockages jaise hair, grease, leaves

questions.explanation: Drain rods flexible hote hain aur soft blockages ko physically push ya break karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: High-pressure water jetting machine ka main fayda kya hai?

options.B: Bade aur tough blockages ko efficiently clear karti hai
options.D: Manual labor ki zaroorat hoti hai

questions.explanation: High-pressure jetting machine tezi se aur poori tarah se pipes ko saaf karti hai, jisme roots aur grease buildup bhi shamil hai.

questions.question: Sewer lines mein gas detection kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf time waste karne ke liye
options.B: Toxic aur flammable gases ke presence ko check karne ke liye
options.C: Paani ka flow check karne ke liye
options.D: Sewer ki gehrai naapne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sewer lines mein hydrogen sulfide, methane jaise dangerous gases ho sakti hain jo workers ke liye jaanleva ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Agar drain cleaning chemicals use kar rahe hain, toh kya precaution lenge?

options.A: Bina gloves ke haath se use karenge
options.B: Proper ventilation aur PPE ka use karenge

questions.explanation: Drain cleaning chemicals corrosive ho sakte hain aur fumes chhod sakte hain, isliye proper safety measures zaroori hain.

questions.question: Fat, Oil, and Grease (FOG) blockages ko kaise prevent kar sakte hain?

options.A: FOG ko sink mein daalte rahenge
options.B: FOG ko drain mein na daal kar alag se dispose karenge
options.C: Hot water se drain flush karenge

questions.explanation: FOG pipes mein jam kar blockages create karta hai, isliye ise separate containers mein collect karke dispose karna chahiye.

questions.question: CCTV drain inspection camera ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Drain mein chhipi hui cheezein dekhne ke liye
options.B: Blockages, cracks aur damage ko accurately locate karne ke liye
options.C: Drain ka temperature naapne ke liye
options.D: Drain ke andar ki awaaz sunne ke liye

questions.explanation: CCTV camera bina khode pipes ke andar ki detailed visual inspection provide karta hai, jisse repair work precise ho jata hai.

questions.question: Sewerage system mein maintenance holes (manholes) ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Sewer lines ki inspection, cleaning aur maintenance ke liye access provide karna
options.D: Road par light lagane ke liye

questions.explanation: Manholes workers ko underground sewer lines tak pahunchne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Hydro-jetting ke baad pipes ko flush karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Bache hue debris ko bahar nikalne aur pipes ko poori tarah saaf karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Flushing se ensure hota hai ki pipe mein koi remaining debris na ho aur flow smooth ho.

questions.question: Root intrusion ko sewer lines se kaise remove karte hain?

options.B: Mechanical root cutters ya high-pressure jetting se remove karte hain
options.D: Roots ko aise hi chhod dete hain

questions.explanation: Tree roots pipes mein ghus kar blockages create karte hain, jinhe special cutting tools ya powerful water jets se hi remove kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Gutter cleaning ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Pani ke proper flow ko maintain rakhne aur water logging se bachane ke liye
options.C: Birds ko aakarshit karne ke liye
options.D: Gutter mein kachra jama karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clogged gutters se water logging, building damage aur hygiene issues ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Sewerage system mein foul smell (badboo) ka kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Decomposing organic matter aur sewer gases

questions.explanation: Sewerage mein maujood organic waste ke decomposition se hydrogen sulfide jaise gases bante hain jo badboo ka karan hote hain.

questions.question: Agar kisi drain mein baar-baar blockage ho, toh kya action lena chahiye?

options.B: Root cause ka pata lagana (jaise structural damage ya improper usage) aur use theek karna
options.C: Us drain ko use karna chhod dena

questions.explanation: Recurring blockages aksar ek underlying problem ka sign hote hain, jaise pipe damage ya improper disposal habits, jinhe identify aur rectify karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Stormwater drains aur sewage drains mein kya antar hai?

options.B: Stormwater drains barish ka paani handle karte hain, jabki sewage drains gharon se nikalne wala waste water handle karte hain
options.C: Stormwater drains sirf garmiyon mein kaam karte hain
options.D: Sewage drains saaf paani handle karte hain

questions.explanation: Dono systems alag-alag tarah ke paani ko manage karte hain aur unka treatment bhi alag hota hai.

questions.question: Catch basins ka kya role hai stormwater drainage system mein?

options.B: Rainwater ko collect karna aur debris ko sewer system mein jaane se rokna

questions.explanation: Catch basins filtration ka kaam karte hain, jisse bade solids storm sewers mein nahi ghuste aur blockages prevent hote hain.

questions.question: Drainage system mein 'grease trap' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Kitchen waste water se grease aur solids ko separate karna

questions.explanation: Grease traps commercial kitchens mein use hote hain taaki grease aur oil drainage pipes mein jam kar blockages na karein.

questions.question: Personal hygiene maintain karna sanitation worker ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Bimariyon aur infections se bachne ke liye
options.D: Apne dosto ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sanitation workers hazardous materials ke contact mein aate hain, isliye personal hygiene unhe infections se bachati hai.

questions.question: Haath dhone ka sahi tarika kya hai?

options.B: Sabun aur paani se kam se kam 20 seconds tak ragad kar dhona

questions.explanation: Proper handwashing germs ko effectively remove karta hai aur infections phailne se rokta hai.

questions.question: Diseases kaise phailti hain sanitation work environment mein?

options.B: Bacteria, viruses aur parasites ke contact se
options.C: Hawa mein udne wale patton se

questions.explanation: Waste aur sewage mein kai pathogens hote hain jo infections ka karan ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Vaccination sanitation workers ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Certain infectious diseases se suraksha provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Vaccinations jaise Tetanus, Hepatitis A aur B, sanitation workers ko work-related infections se bachate hain.

questions.question: Contaminated surfaces ko saaf karne ke liye kya use karna chahiye?

options.B: Paani aur sabun ya disinfectant

questions.explanation: Disinfectants germs ko marte hain aur surfaces ko safe banate hain.

questions.question: Food and waterborne diseases kaise phailti hain?

options.B: Contaminated food aur water consume karne se

questions.explanation: Food and waterborne diseases tab hoti hain jab hum contaminated food ya paani ka sevan karte hain.

questions.question: Mosquito-borne diseases (jaise Dengue, Malaria) ko kaise control kar sakte hain?

options.B: Stagnant water (ruka hua paani) ko eliminate karke

questions.explanation: Mosquitoes rukey hue paani mein breed karte hain, isliye unke breeding grounds ko hatana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Sanitation ka public health par kya impact hai?

options.B: Achha sanitation bimariyon ko kam karta hai aur public health ko improve karta hai

questions.explanation: Proper sanitation bimariyon ke phailne ko rokta hai aur community ke overall well-being ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Rodent control sanitation work mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Rodents ko ghar mein rakhne ke liye
options.B: Rodents bimariyan phailate hain aur infrastructure ko damage karte hain
options.C: Rodents ko khana dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Rats aur mice leptospirosis jaise bimariyan phailate hain aur wires aur pipes ko damage kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Community engagement sanitation initiatives mein kyun important hai?

options.B: Community members ko sanitation practices mein involve karne aur ownership develop karne ke liye
options.C: Community ko ignore karne ke liye
options.D: Community ko paise dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Jab log sanitation efforts mein participate karte hain, toh programs zyada successful aur sustainable hote hain.

questions.question: Leptospirosis kis se phailti hai?

options.B: Contaminated paani ya mitti ke contact se jo infected animal urine se contaminated ho

questions.explanation: Leptospirosis ek bacterial infection hai jo aksar rodents ke urine se contaminated paani ya mitti ke contact se phailta hai.

questions.question: Diarrheal diseases ko rokne mein sanitation ka kya role hai?

options.B: Proper sanitation aur hygiene practices se water aur food contamination kam hota hai, jisse diarrheal diseases rukti hain

questions.explanation: Achha sanitation open defecation ko rokta hai aur safe disposal of human waste ensure karta hai, jisse diarrheal diseases ka spread kam hota hai.

questions.question: Kya sanitation workers ko apni wounds ko turant saaf aur cover karna chahiye?

options.A: Nahi, aise hi chhod dena chahiye
options.B: Haan, infection se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Open wounds infections ke liye entry point hote hain, isliye unhe turant saaf aur cover karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Vector-borne diseases kya hoti hain?

options.B: Bimariyan jo insects ya animals (vectors) dwara phailai jaati hain
options.C: Bimariyan jo sirf plants mein hoti hain
options.D: Bimariyan jo direct contact se phailti hain

questions.explanation: Mosquitoes, ticks, aur fleas jaise vectors bimariyan phaila sakte hain.

questions.question: Wastewater treatment ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Wastewater se harmful contaminants remove karna taaki use safely environment mein release kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Wastewater treatment se water bodies ka pollution kam hota hai aur public health protect hoti hai.

questions.question: Hygiene ke context mein 'F-Diagram' kya represent karta hai?

options.B: Faeces se phailne wali bimariyon ka transmission route

questions.explanation: F-Diagram (F for Faeces) batata hai ki kaise faecal-oral route se diseases phailti hain, aur sanitation barriers ki importance ko highlight karta hai.

questions.question: Swachh Bharat Abhiyan ka main objective kya hai?

options.B: India ko open defecation-free (ODF) banana aur solid waste management improve karna

questions.explanation: Swachh Bharat Abhiyan ka lakshya nationwide cleanliness aur sanitation ko improve karna hai.

questions.question: Waste Management Rules 2016 ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Yeh solid waste ke scientific management aur disposal ke liye guidelines provide karte hain
options.C: Yeh sirf paper waste ke liye hain
options.D: Yeh sirf industrial waste ke liye hain

questions.explanation: Yeh rules waste generation, segregation, collection, storage, transport, processing aur disposal ko regulate karte hain.

questions.question: Environmental pollution mein sanitation ka kya role hai?

options.B: Proper sanitation pollution ko kam karta hai
options.C: Sanitation ka pollution se koi lena dena nahi
options.D: Sanitation sirf air pollution karta hai

questions.explanation: Achha sanitation waste ke proper disposal aur treatment se zameen, paani aur hawa ke pollution ko rokta hai.

questions.question: National Green Tribunal (NGT) ka kya role hai sanitation se related issues mein?

options.B: Environmental protection aur conservation se related cases ko decide karna

questions.explanation: NGT environmental laws ko enforce karta hai aur pollution, waste management jaise issues par rulings deta hai.

questions.question: Kya sanitation workers ko environmental regulations ki jaankari honi chahiye?

options.A: Nahi, yeh unka kaam nahi hai
options.B: Haan, taaki woh apne kaam ko legal aur eco-friendly tareeke se kar sakein

questions.explanation: Environmental regulations ki knowledge workers ko safe aur compliant operations ensure karne mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Biodegradable waste ka environmental impact kya hai?

options.B: Yeh naturally decompose ho kar soil ko enrich karta hai, agar sahi tareeke se manage kiya jaye
options.C: Yeh sirf air pollution karta hai
options.D: Yeh paani ko zaharila banata hai

questions.explanation: Biodegradable waste composting ke through soil fertility badha sakta hai, agar use landfills mein na fenka jaye jahan anaerobic decomposition se methane gas banti hai.

questions.question: Non-biodegradable waste (jaise plastic) ka environmental impact kya hai?

options.A: Yeh jaldi decompose ho jata hai
options.B: Yeh hazaron saalon tak environment mein rehta hai, soil aur water pollution karta hai
options.C: Yeh environment ke liye achha hai

questions.explanation: Non-biodegradable waste environment mein jama hota rehta hai, wildlife ko nuksan pahunchata hai aur ecosystems ko disturb karta hai.

questions.question: India mein manual scavenging ko rokne ke liye kaun sa Act hai?

options.B: The Prohibition of Employment as Manual Scavengers and their Rehabilitation Act, 2013

questions.explanation: Yeh Act manual scavenging ko ban karta hai aur manual scavengers ke rehabilitation ka provision deta hai, unki dignity aur safety ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Zero Waste concept ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Kachre ko kam karna, reuse karna aur recycle karna taaki landfills mein kuch bhi na jaye

questions.explanation: Zero Waste ek philosophy hai jiska aim hai waste ko minimize karna, resources ko conserve karna aur environmental impact ko kam karna.

questions.question: Sanitation work mein noise pollution ko kaise control kar sakte hain?

options.A: High-noise machines ko zyada use karna
options.B: Ear protection use karna, equipment maintenance aur noise barriers ka use karna

questions.explanation: Noise pollution workers aur nearby communities ke liye harmful ho sakta hai, isliye control measures zaroori hain.

questions.question: Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) ka sanitation projects mein kya role hai?

options.B: Companies ka social aur environmental well-being mein contribute karna

questions.explanation: CSR ke तहत companies sanitation projects, infrastructure aur awareness programs mein invest karti hain.

questions.question: Plastic Waste Management Rules 2016 ka kya aim hai?

options.B: Plastic waste generation ko control karna aur uske proper collection, segregation aur processing ko ensure karna

questions.explanation: Yeh rules plastic pollution ko tackle karne aur sustainable plastic management practices ko promote karne ke liye banaye gaye hain.

questions.question: Wetland ecosystems ki suraksha sanitation se kaise related hai?

options.A: Wetlands ka sanitation se koi connection nahi
options.B: Proper wastewater treatment aur disposal wetlands ko sewage pollution se bachata hai
options.C: Wetlands sirf kachra jama karte hain
options.D: Wetlands ko saaf rakhne ki zaroorat nahi

questions.explanation: Wetlands biodiversity ke liye important hain aur natural water filtration mein help karte hain, isliye unhe pollution se bachana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Sanitation workers ke liye grievance redressal mechanism (shikayat nivaran pranali) kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Unki working conditions, safety aur rights se related issues ko address karne ke liye
options.C: Unhe kaam se hatane ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek effective grievance mechanism workers ko apni problems ko raise karne aur unka solution paane ka mauka deta hai, jisse workplace environment behtar hota hai.

questions.question: Solid Waste Management (SWM) mein '3R' principle ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle

questions.explanation: 3R principle waste generation ko kam karne aur resource efficiency badhane ka ek fundamental approach hai.

questions.question: Sustainable Sanitation ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Aise sanitation systems jo environmental, social aur economic roop se long-term tak viable hon

questions.explanation: Sustainable sanitation ka matlab hai aise systems jo na sirf present needs ko poora karein, balki future generations ke liye bhi environment ko protect karein aur resources ko conserve karein.
